subcodes.first_line: O steadfast leaf! From the day thou didst return until now, thou hast ever been before Mine eyes and continually remembered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه موقنه از روزی که مراجعت نمودی تا بحال همیشه منظور بودی و دائما مذکور
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement
